title: Implement alerting clock REPL demo script and docs

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Building demos/alerting_clock.py REPL: alert|warn|info commands with default 10s hold, push-left in/push-right out transitions, and color/background overrides including -s5 shorthand.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented demos/alerting_clock.py and docs entry. REPL supports alert|warn|info, default 10s hold, --seconds/-s and -sN shorthand, --color and --background-color overrides, push-left in + push-right out transitions. Demo is now running for manual device verification.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Follow-up fixes from live test: transition visibility too subtle; updating alerting_clock defaults for clearly visible push transitions and adding persisted readline history (up/down arrows) via dotfile.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Added REPL history and arrow-key navigation using readline with persistent history file ~/.pypixoo/alerting_clock_history. Increased transition visibility defaults (fps=5, transition_ms=1200) and added --transition-ms option.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Applying palette normalization from live feedback: set alert/warn/info default foregrounds to same intensity level and dim all default backgrounds to band level 2.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Completed: alerting/kanbus clock REPL demo script and documentation are implemented and validated through live device testing.
